title: austrobuxus nitidus
intro: Austrobuxus nitidus, also known as the shiny boxwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Austrobuxus nitidus include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
